steps.title: Identify the study with that
steps.content: The sentence needs "compared the lengths of eggs" to identify which ecological study is being discussed. A restrictive relative clause with "that" can attach that description to "study" before the main verb "found."

steps.title: Keep the clause restrictive
steps.content: Choice A wrongly places a comma before "that." Choice B omits the relative pronoun, making the verb sequence awkward and ungrammatical. Choice D uses a nonrestrictive "which" clause, but the study still needs to be identified. The restrictive form is needed. The answer is C.
